creationGateway.title: Create Coupon
creationGateway.description: Create a Shop Coupon or Product Coupon now to attract buyers.

shopCoupon.title: Shop Coupon
shopCoupon.description: Coupons applicable for all your products to boost shopwide sales

productCoupon.title: Product Coupon
productCoupon.description: Coupons applicable for selected products to run specific promotions

privateCoupon.title: Private Coupon
privateCoupon.description: Coupons that are only sharable via code to targeted customers

basicInfo.title: Basic Information
basicInfo.programNameHint: Coupon Name will not be displayed to Buyers
basicInfo.couponCodePrefix: Please input only characters (A-Z), numbers (0-9); max 5 characters.
basicInfo.allowEarlySave: Allow code saving before Usage Time
basicInfo.earlySaveHint: Once voucher starts displaying, this section can no longer be edited

discountSettings.title: Discount Settings
discountSettings.totalMaxUsagesHint: Total number of discount codes that can be used

displayAndProducts.title: Discount Code Display and Application
displayAndProducts.displayCodeOnlyFixed: To be shared through voucher code
displayAndProducts.allProductsDescription: For selected products only, some products are prohibited from promotions due to regulations in your country or because they are member-exclusive. Learn More

createSuccess.title: Coupon Created
createSuccess.message: Your coupon has been created successfully.

createError.title: Creation Failed
createError.message: An error occurred while creating the coupon. Please try again.

loadError.title: Load Failed
loadError.message: Failed to load coupon details. Please try again.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 100 characters.
validation.codeAlphanumeric: Coupon code must contain only letters (A-Z) and numbers (0-9).
validation.codeTooLong: Coupon code suffix must be at most 5 characters.
validation.startDateFuture: Start date must be in the future.
validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after the start date.
validation.discountAmountRequired: Discount amount is required and must be greater than 0.
validation.discountPercentageRange: Discount percentage must be between 1 and 100.
validation.maxDiscountAmountRequired: Maximum discount amount is required and must be greater than 0.
validation.maxDiscountAmountTooSmall: User can't enjoy full discount percentage, please adjust with the following options 1. Reduce the min basket to {suggestedMinOrder} 2. Reduce the discount percentage to {suggestedPercentage}% 3. Increase the max discount to {suggestedMaxDiscount}
validation.minOrderValueRequired: Minimum order value must be greater than 0.
validation.totalUsagesRequired: Total number of usages is required and must be greater than 0.
validation.maxUsagesPerBuyerRequired: Maximum usages per buyer is required and must be greater than 0.
validation.earlySaveBeforeStart: Early save date must be before the usage start date.

notifications.endConfirm: Are you sure you want to end the coupon "{name}" earlier than scheduled? Once ended, users will no longer be able to claim or use this coupon.
notifications.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the coupon "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

endSuccess.title: Coupon Ended
endSuccess.message: The coupon has been successfully ended.

deleteSuccess.title: Coupon Deleted
deleteSuccess.message: The coupon has been permanently removed.

fetchError.title: Fetch Failed
fetchError.message: There was an error while retrieving the coupon list.
